summary: The HeroSection component was updated to use the new Querétaro aqueduct image, but the image is referenced at '/assets/new-qro-main.jpeg' instead of the required '/assets/generated/new-qro-main.jpeg'. Additionally, the actual image file does not appear to have been added to the repository (no files were added in the diff). The overlay effect added may also conflict with the non-goal of not adding overlay effects unless already present.

missing_requirements.requirement: The file new-qro-main.jpeg must be placed at frontend/public/assets/generated/new-qro-main.jpeg
missing_requirements.reason: No new file was added in the diff (ADDED FILES: none), so the image asset was never saved to the repository at the required path.

missing_requirements.requirement: The image path used in HeroSection must reference /assets/generated/new-qro-main.jpeg matching the specified asset path frontend/public/assets/generated/new-qro-main.jpeg
missing_requirements.reason: HeroSection references '/assets/new-qro-main.jpeg' instead of the required '/assets/generated/new-qro-main.jpeg'.

hallucinated_features.description: A dark overlay (bg-black/45) was added over the hero background image for text legibility.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request explicitly states as a non-goal: adding overlay effects unless already present in the current HeroSection implementation. There is no evidence the overlay was pre-existing.
